message:
feat: integrate runtime health checks into doctor diagnostics

Bridge policy-layer runtime health checks into unified doctor
diagnostics output. Convert DiagnosticCheck.name from &'static str
to String to support dynamic names from policy engine.

New helpers:
- recommendation_from_runtime_health_check: extracts remediation
  hints from health check results
- diagnostic_check_from_runtime_health: maps health check statuses
  into the diagnostic framework

Extends run_diagnostics() to surface policy-layer checks (Decision
Log, Connector Governor, etc.) alongside environment/runtime checks
in a single doctor command output.

Adds runtime_health_check_bridge_uses_summary_and_command_hint test
and extends integration test to verify policy diagnostics appear.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
